summary: Admin Area Migration (Phase 1 & 2) fully tested. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All admin endpoints properly restrict access to director role only - athletes get 403. Frontend admin pages fully functional: Admin Dashboard, Integrations, Universities. Sidebar correctly shows Admin section for directors and hides it for athletes.

issues: Logo images fail to load (ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin) - external logo URLs blocked by CORS

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/dashboard/stats returns users, subscriptions, activity, knowledge_base sections
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/integrations returns all 6 integration statuses (gmail, stripe, ai, scorecard, coach_scraper, url_discovery)
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/universities returns paginated list with search, division, health filters
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/universities/health returns data health stats
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/universities/{name} returns single university detail
VERIFIED: PUT /api/admin/universities/{name} updates university fields successfully
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/universities/export returns CSV with correct headers
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/coach-scraper/scrape starts background scraping (returns started status)
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/coach-scraper/status returns scrape progress
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/coach-scraper/scrape-one scrapes single university
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/integrations/scorecard/sync starts sync (returns started status)
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/integrations/scorecard/sync-status returns sync progress
VERIFIED: All admin endpoints return 403 for athlete users
VERIFIED: All admin endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests
VERIFIED: Admin Dashboard page displays stats cards, subscription breakdown, KB health
VERIFIED: Admin Integrations page displays 6 integration cards with status badges
VERIFIED: Trigger buttons (coach-scrape, scorecard-sync) work - show toast notifications
VERIFIED: Admin Universities page displays search, filters, paginated table, edit modal
VERIFIED: Sidebar shows ADMIN section with 3 nav items (Admin, Integrations, Universities) for director
VERIFIED: Sidebar does NOT show ADMIN section for athlete users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin migration fully tested. Key data-testids: admin-dashboard-page, admin-integrations-page, admin-universities-page, nav-admin-dashboard, nav-admin-integrations, nav-admin-universities, trigger-coach-scrape, trigger-scorecard-sync, university-search, export-csv, edit-uni-{index}. The admin guard (admin_guard.py) checks for director or admin role. All admin routes are prefixed with /api/admin/*. College Scorecard shows 'Not configured' status (no API key set). Coach scraper and scorecard sync are background tasks - trigger returns immediately with 'started' status.
